name: brain
description: Persistent cognitive memory for AI agents — powered by YantrikDB's 5-index architecture with personality traits, bond evolution, and context assembly
author: Yantrikos

hooks.name: brain-startup
hooks.description: Load agent memory on startup, save session on /new

optional.name: YANTRIK_AGENT_ID
optional.description: Unique identifier for this agent's memories

optional.name: YANTRIK_ENCRYPTION_KEY
optional.description: Fernet encryption key (auto-generated if not set)

security.reason: Plugin executes Python to manage YantrikDB memory database and encryption keys

code_execution.what: Runs Python to manage YantrikDB memory database
code_execution.when: On startup, /new command, and memory API calls

scanner_notes.plugin_type: Code plugin (executesCode: true). Runs Python locally to manage a YantrikDB memory database. No remote code, no network calls.
